name: koodo-reader
description: A modern ebook manager and reader with sync and backup capacities for Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS and Web
readme_summary: Koodo Reader is a versatile, cross-platform ebook manager and reader that supports a wide array of formats. It offers seamless syncing and backup capabilities across multiple cloud storage services and operating systems, enhancing the reading experience with features like AI-powered tools and customizable display options.
key_features: Extensive format support (EPUB, PDF, MOBI, AZW3, TXT, FB2, CBR, CBZ, MD, DOCX, HTML, etc.)
Cross-platform availability (Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS, Web)
Cloud sync and backup with multiple providers (OneDrive, Google Drive, Dropbox, iCloud, etc.)
AI-powered dictionary, summarization, encyclopedia, and translation
Customizable reading layouts and appearance (scrolling, columns, themes, fonts)
Reading aids like text-to-speech, bookmarks, notes, and highlights
primary_use_case: Managing and reading a diverse collection of ebooks across multiple devices and platforms with cloud synchronization and advanced reading features.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant, open book acting as a portal, with diverse digital book formats (EPUB, PDF, MOBI icons) flowing into it from one side and emerging as a unified, glowing stream of text and images on the other, directed towards various devices (laptop, tablet, phone) arranged around it. Subtle lines of code and cloud icons connect the devices to the book portal, symbolizing seamless sync and cross-platform access. The scene is set in a cozy, modern library nook with soft, ambient lighting, rendered in a clean, 3D isometric illustration style with a focus on clarity and accessibility.

name: quarkdown
description: 🪐 Markdown with superpowers: from ideas to papers, presentations, websites, books, and knowledge bases.
readme_summary: Quarkdown is a versatile, Markdown-based typesetting system that extends Markdown with scripting capabilities, allowing users to compile a single project into various outputs like books, papers, knowledge bases, and presentations. It supports functions, variables, a standard library, and custom extensions for dynamic content generation.
key_features: Compiles to books, papers, knowledge bases, presentations
Includes a standard library with layout builders, I/O, math, conditionals, and loops
Allows defining custom functions and libraries
Seamlessly integrates with CommonMark and GFM
primary_use_case: To provide a unified and powerful system for creating diverse document types from a single Markdown source, enhanced with scripting capabilities.
cover_image_prompt: A master craftsman, holding a single, elegant quill pen, stands before a large, intricate loom. The quill is writing on a scroll of plain paper, and as it writes, the words magically weave themselves into different tapestries: one a detailed book cover, another a scientific paper's abstract, a third a vibrant presentation slide, and a fourth a complex network of interconnected knowledge nodes. Subtle digital particles emanate from the quill, and small, glowing UI elements representing code functions hover around the scene. The background is a softly lit, organized workshop. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a warm, inviting color palette, emphasizing the transformation of simple text into diverse, high-quality outputs.

name: mistral-vibe
description: Minimal CLI coding agent by Mistral
readme_summary: Mistral Vibe is an open-source, conversational command-line coding assistant powered by Mistral AI models. It enables developers to interact with their codebase using natural language, facilitating tasks like code exploration, modification, and execution through a powerful set of integrated tools.
key_features: Autocompletion for commands and file paths
primary_use_case: To provide developers with an AI-powered conversational interface for interacting with and managing their codebases directly from the command line.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, friendly owl perched on a stack of glowing code scrolls, holding a magnifying glass that illuminates specific lines of code. The owl is actively conversing with a silhouette of a programmer, represented by a thought bubble filled with code snippets and project file icons. The background is a softly lit, organized digital workspace. Subtle digital particles flow from the owl's beak towards the code scrolls, symbolizing understanding and modification. The repository name 'Mistral Vibe' is subtly etched onto the owl's perch. The style is a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic and a color palette of blues, greens, and soft whites, emphasizing clarity and intelligence.
